prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7682名→5858名→5123名→4653名→4287名，呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约3395名，年均前移约849名；2025年 基准位次约4287名，为历史最高水平；该校在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年24人、2022年26人、2023年26人、2024年25人、2025年28人；2026年计 划27人，较2025年减少1人，小幅缩招约3.6%，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第50名→2022年第53名→2023年第49 名→2024年第45名→2025年第43名→2026年第43名，排名持续上升，近年稳定在43–45名区间，属于中上游211高校；该校声誉平稳，近年未见明显负面舆情或投档 断档记录；抖音综合热度排名第27位（较热），主要因"国防七子""三海一核"等标签受到关注，张雪峰等升学规划博主多次推荐其水声工程、核工程等王牌专业，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；船舶与海洋工程、水声工程、核工程与核技术等特色专业在国内具有领先地位，与" 三海一核"办学定位高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业在2024–2026年持续高热，与该校自动化类、计算机类、电子 信息类等招生专业高度匹配，相关专业报考热度较高；天津市2026年考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约10062人（增幅约14%），竞争显著加剧，逐年小幅上升，卷面难度相对稳定；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在天津市招生计划约27人，占比较小；天津考生对东北地区高校的地 域偏好一般，但该校作为国防七子之一，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强劲势头、2026年招生计划小幅缩招、天津市考生总数大幅增加 （+14%）、学校排名稳步上升及抖音热度较高等因素，竞争加剧的驱动力强于缩招带来的缓解效应。在2025年基准4287名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次约4225名，较2025年前 移约62名；波动区间3725–4725名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 船舶与海洋工程（兴海领军班/钱学森班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、信息安全）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、人工智能等8个专业任选）
- 水声工程（钱学森班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（水声工程、电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程等6个专业任选）
- 航空航天类（飞行器设计与工程、飞行器动力工程、工程力学、能源与动力工程等5个专业任选）
- 海洋工程类（船舶与海洋工程、港口航道与海岸工程、海洋机器人等7个专业任选）
- 核工程与核技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 能源动力类（能源与动力工程、轮机工程）
- 机械类（机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计）
- 智能制造工程
- 数学与应用数学（双学位试验班）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、电子商务）
- 金融学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4225名，区间3725–4725名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<3725名）可重点冲击一档的船舶与 海洋工程（兴海领军/钱学森班）、计算机类、自动化类等王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>4725名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校平台后再通过大类分流或转专业调整。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin were approximately 7682 → 5858 → 5123 → 4653 → 4287, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 3395 places in the past 4 years, averaging about 849 places per year; in 2025, the baseline ranking was about 4287, the highest historical level; the university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin: 24 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 28 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 27, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.6%, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 50th in 2021 → 53rd in 2022 → 49th in 2023 → 45th in 2024 → 43rd in 2025 → 43rd in 2026, ranking continuously rising, stable in the 43–45 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the university's reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or admission gaps in recent years; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 27th (relatively hot), mainly due to labels such as 'Seven Sons of National Defense' and 'Three Seas and One Nuclear', attracting attention, and study planning bloggers like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended its top majors such as Underwater Acoustic Engineering and Nuclear Engineering, with high application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at the university; characteristic majors such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustic Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology have leading positions domestically, highly aligned with the 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' positioning.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently hot from 2024 to 2026, highly matching the university's enrollment majors in Automation, Computer Science, and Electronic Information, with high application enthusiasm for related majors; the total number of examinees in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 from 71,938 in 2025 (an increase of about 14%), significantly intensifying competition, with a slight annual increase and relatively stable exam difficulty; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, with an enrollment plan of about 27 in Tianjin, a small proportion; Tianjin examinees generally have average regional preference for universities in Northeast China, but as one of the Seven Sons of National Defense, the university has strong appeal to science and engineering students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong momentum of continuous forward shift in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in Tianjin (+14%), the steady rise in university ranking, and high Douyin popularity, the driving force of intensified competition is stronger than the easing effect of the reduction. Based on the 2025 baseline of 4287, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to be about 4225, a forward shift of about 62 places from 2025; the fluctuation range is 3725–4725.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class/Qian Xuesen Class)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc., 8 majors optional)
- Underwater Acoustic Engineering (Qian Xuesen Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Underwater Acoustic Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc., 6 majors optional)
- Aerospace (Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics, Energy and Power Engineering, etc., 5 majors optional)
- Ocean Engineering (Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Port, Waterway and Coastal Engineering, Marine Robotics, etc., 7 majors optional)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Energy and Power (Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Double Degree Pilot Class)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, E-commerce)
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 4225, range 3725–4725. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<3725), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Xinghai Leading/Qian Xuesen Class), Computer Science, and Automation; if ranking is near the lower limit (>4725), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, and then adjust through broad category分流 or major transfer after entering the university.
